summary: Iteration 2 - Stripe Payment Flow Refactor Testing COMPLETED. All backend APIs pass (11/11). Frontend 3-step booking flow works perfectly including Stripe CardElement integration.
critical_code_review_comments: Route mismatch: Navbar links to /reservation but some tests tried /reserver - this is correctly handled by React Router
The cancel-reservation endpoint expects UUID format for reservation IDs (not integer) - this is correct PostgreSQL behavior
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment flow refactor verified: create-setup-intent returns clientSecret/setupIntentId/customerId WITHOUT reservationId (no DB write). confirm-and-book correctly REJECTS non-succeeded SetupIntents. charge-today-deposits returns proper result structure. Frontend Reservation.js 3-step flow works: Step 1 shows 14 prestations, Step 2 shows dates 48h+ ahead with time slots, Step 3 shows client form + Stripe CardElement after filling all fields. cron-payment.js is loaded in index.js with schedule '0 8 * * *' for daily 8h00 deposit charges.

create_setup_intent.details: Returns clientSecret, setupIntentId, customerId, montantTotal, montantAcompte. Does NOT return reservationId - reservation not created.

confirm_and_book.details: Rejects non-succeeded SetupIntent with 400 error. Creates reservation only after successful card validation.

cancel_reservation.details: Returns 404 for non-existent reservation (UUID format required). Endpoint properly routed.

charge_today_deposits.details: Returns proper structure with total, success, failed counts and details array.

cron_payment_loaded.details: cron-payment.js is required in index.js line 6. Schedule set for '0 8 * * *' (daily at 8h00).

frontend_reservation_flow.details: Step 1: 14 prestations displayed. Step 2: Dates 48h+ ahead, 19 time slots. Step 3: Client form + Stripe CardElement after all fields filled.

stripe_card_form.details: Stripe iframe, PrivateStripeElement, and confirm button all visible on step 3.

prestations_api.details: Returns 14 prestations with all required fields.

disponibilites_api.details: Returns time slots array with heure_debut, heure_fin, disponible fields.
